title: Masterplast Instant Relief Ice Wrap Cold Bandage, 3.2M X 10Cm
features: COLD THERAPY IN AN INSTANT! Masterplast Ice wrap, is a cold bandage which uses a revolutionary new technique for treating injuries, muscle pain and strains. The bandage is long - 3.2 metres x 10cm elastic bandage, to provide relief in an instant. Keep in sports, gym or kit bag, add to a home first aid kit for instant relief from twists and sprains

SPECIALLY FORMULATED SOLUTION: Masterplast Ice wrap is composed of a specially formulated solution infused into an elastic bandage which begins to evaporate on contact with the skin, thereby cooling the area the bandage is applied to
REDUCE RECOVERY TIME: Masterplast Ice wrap reduces recovery time from injuries by combining both the cooling and compression process in one easy to use step
REDUCE SWELLING, QUICK RELIEF: Masterplast Ice wrap reduces swelling and provides sufficient cooling to make it a quick ready to use treatment
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Masterplast Ice wrap Cold Bandage. Size 3.2M x 10cm
